description:
Three fixtures contribute nothing the keepers don't:

  expect_clif_demo  → byte-identical to add1; its sole role was to
                      demo expect_clif_* header keys, which fz-8zx
                      retires. Delete.
  callsite_narrowing_dist → byte-identical to vr3_float_args (both
                      input.fz and all three sidecars). vr3_float_args
                      has the strictly-stronger raw-f64-register check
                      and fits VR naming. The .27.10 narrowing fact is
                      already in vr3_float_args's narrative. Delete.
  id_int_atom       → strict subset of polymorphic (id over int+atom
                      vs id over int+atom+bool). polymorphic's
                      expected.specs pins the 'one spec, no
                      specialization' claim by construction. Delete.

After: 33 fixtures (was 36), 0 byte-duplicate pairs.

Invariants:
- 539 tests green
- fixture_index_up_to_date regenerated
title: fz-ul4.27.22.21: fixtures — eliminate redundant duplicate examples
